description: A mission planner needs to request and schedule time on the DSN to communicate with an interplanetary probe.

nodes.task_description: Determine the required communication windows based on the probe's trajectory and mission events.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies the critical timeframes when communication is needed.

nodes.task_description: Submit a request to the DSN scheduling authority for antenna time during those windows.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly fills out and submits the DSN time request form.

nodes.task_description: Receive the approved schedule from the DSN and update the mission's operational plan accordingly.

expected_outcome.value: Agent incorporates the confirmed DSN passes into the mission plan.
